message:
✨ Add missing CARD_TITLES and descriptions for dashboard card types (#561)

Add CARD_TITLES entries for card types used in dashboards that were
missing from the registry:
- statefulset_status, daemonset_status, replicaset_status
- job_status, cronjob_status, hpa_status
- node_status, pv_status, resource_quota_status
- ingress_status, network_policy_status
- operator_subscription_status, configmap_status
- hardware_health

Also add corresponding CARD_DESCRIPTIONS for all new entries.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
